title: Phase 4c: JSON API daemon + browser/Electron client
description:
A local JSON API daemon that exposes nie-core over HTTP/WebSocket, plus a browser-first client (HTML/JS) that can run in a tab or be wrapped in Electron.

Two-component architecture:

## Component 1: nie-daemon (local API server)
- New binary `nie-daemon` that starts a local HTTP+WebSocket server (default: 127.0.0.1:7734)
- REST endpoints:
  - GET  /api/whoami               → { pub_id, display_name }
  - GET  /api/users                → [ { pub_id, display_name, online } ]
  - POST /api/send { to, text }    → { message_id }
  - GET  /api/wallet/balance       → { zatoshi, zec, network }
  - POST /api/wallet/pay { to, amount_zatoshi } → { session_id }
- WebSocket endpoint /ws/events   → streams JSON events (MessageReceived, UserJoined, PaymentUpdate, etc.)
- Auth: shared secret token in a local file (~/.local/share/nie/daemon.token); required on every request
- CORS: only allow localhost origins (no remote browser access)
- Single-origin binding: 127.0.0.1 only, never 0.0.0.0

## Component 2: nie-web (browser client)
- Static HTML/CSS/JS bundle served by nie-daemon at GET /
- Framework: vanilla JS or Preact (small bundle, no build toolchain required for development)
- Chat view, users sidebar, wallet panel
- Connects to ws://localhost:7734/ws/events for live updates
- Works in any browser tab at http://localhost:7734
- Electron wrapper: point BrowserWindow to http://localhost:7734 — no additional code needed

## Design decisions:
- nie-daemon spawns and owns the nie-core WebSocket connection to the relay (same as nie-cli)
- Single daemon instance per user; subsequent launches detect running daemon via PID file
- All key material stays in nie-daemon process; the browser/Electron client never sees secrets
- Token auth prevents other local processes from injecting messages

Blocking: Phase 1 (chat) sufficient. Wallet API endpoints require Phase 2.
close_reason: Phase 4c nie-daemon MVP complete. nie-0tvc.10 (wallet API) deferred: blocked on nie-7qp (Phase 2 Zcash wallet, not started).
